title: Smoky Greek Lamb Kebabs
description: Juicy lamb skewers infused with the flavors of Greece, featuring a smoky twist.

ingredients.name: Lamb shoulder, cut into 1-inch cubes
ingredients.notes: Make sure lamb is at room temperature before marinating.

ingredients.name: Wooden skewers, soaked in water for 30 minutes

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together yogurt, olive oil, smoked paprika, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Add lamb cubes to the marinade and mix until coated. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread lamb cubes onto the wooden skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until lamb reaches an internal temperature of 145°F.
Let skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving. Drizzle with lemon juice and serve immediately.
